title: Larger boxes on long text forms
excerpt:
Hi, Im using the forms for meeting notes and briefs but the boxes for Long text are formatted so small that when writing the user has to keep scrolling up and down to view whats been written. 
Can the box size be editabl…

posts.author: SarahBeingiconic (Sarah clayton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Im using the forms for meeting notes and briefs but the boxes for Long text are formatted so small that when writing the user has to keep scrolling up and down to view whats been written.
Can the box size be editable so if we know the user will be writing the maximum charactor length that it will actually show that on the screen?

posts.author: corjlsoftware (Corjl)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be helpful to be able to set and lock a setting for the size/height of text columns/updates section so that when viewing in a form, the size is what was initially set in the board. Currently, the updates section in the form is manually adjustable only
